// n = 80, k = 60, seed = 9527, # of sigma = 20, # of algorithms = 3

Hybrid Algorithm
3	3	3	5	5	5	7	7	9	9	11	13	14	14	14	16	19	18	19	18
3	3	5	5	5	5	7	7	9	9	11	13	14	14	15	18	18	18	17	17

3	3	3	5	5	5	7	7	9	9	11	13	14	14	14	16	23	17	20	20

3	3	5	5	5	5	7	7	9	9	11	13	14	14	15	19	50	18	16	19
